candidates.why: This is the explicit COGS-related D&A row, but it appears to be a component of the already selected COGS bucket because it sits directly with 'Other Cost of Goods and Services Sold' and sums into 'Cost of revenues/COGS'. Since the selected COGS final_choice already includes 'Cost of revenues/COGS' (and also 'Production Expenses'), adding this separately would risk double counting.

This row is above SG&A and below gross income, but it is not clearly tied as a separate add-on to the selected COGS bucket. Given the lack of values and unclear bucket attribution, it should not be added separately to COGS.
Generic depreciation row is unpopulated in the excerpt and not usable for a separate COGS D&A add-back.

variables.notes: The explicit COGS D&A row appears embedded within the selected COGS total rather than sitting outside it as a same-level separate operating expense line.

candidates.why: This is the explicit SG&A-related D&A row, but it appears to be a component of the already selected 'Selling and administration expenses' row because it sits alongside 'Other Selling and administrative expenses' and sums into that SG&A total. Therefore it should not be added separately.
Although operating-section related, this row is not clearly identified as part of SG&A and has no visible values. It should not be separately added to XSGA_DA based on the excerpt.
Generic depreciation row is blank and provides no basis for a separate SG&A D&A add-back.

variables.notes: The selected XSGA bucket is the SG&A total row, and the explicit SGA D&A line looks like a sub-component already included in that total. No separate R&D line is present, and no additional SG&A D&A row should be added.
